name: Todd Schorr
description: Todd Schorr is a founding figure of Lowbrow art whose paintings channel the American id — monster movies, Kustom Kulture, advertising mascots, and Cold War anxiety colliding in massive, technically virtuosic canvases. Trained as a commercial illustrator, Schorr brought advertising's polish to deeply subversive subject matter, producing some of the most complex narrative paintings in the movement.
